gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/138)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/138)
text: هُ كَانَ يَقُولُ الْقَدِيدُ لَحْمُ سَوْءٍ لِأَنَّهُ يَسْتَرْخِي فِي الْمَعِدَةِ وَ يُهَيِّجُ كُلَّ دَاءٍ وَ لَا يَنْفَعُ مِنْ شَيْ‏ءٍ بَلْ يَضُرُّهُ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Jerk is an evil meat because it relaxes in the stomach and agitates every illness, and it does no benefit anything, but it harms’.
en.sarwar: 4. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say, ‘Al-Qadid (dried up meat) is a bad kind of meat because it softens in the stomach and induces every kind of illness and it does not benefit anything, instead it harms.’”
